admin_ai_config.provider_note_gemini: Native Gemini SDK path (GEMINI_API_KEY required when explicitly selected).

aisle.list_subtitle: Status, assets, and actions per aisle.

errors.tooManyFiles: You can upload up to 5 files at a time. Split the upload into groups of up to 5 files.

errors.tooManyImages: You can upload up to 5 images at a time for this aisle. Split the upload into groups of up to 5 files.

errors.tooManyFiles: You can import up to 5 files at a time. Split the import into groups of up to 5 files.

aisle_source_assets.action_tooltip: View and manage source images used as evidence for this aisle
aisle_source_assets.delete_confirm_anonymous: Delete this source file? This cannot be undone.
aisle_source_assets.drawer_subtitle: Images used as evidence to process and validate aisle results.
aisle_source_assets.empty_message: No source images yet for this aisle. Upload files to use as evidence when processing and reviewing results.
aisle_source_assets.management_body: Upload or manage images used as evidence for this aisle.

analytics.summary_note_multi_run: Multi-run: position totals count every persisted row in scope, not only the operational or single-resolved slice shown on Aisle Results. Do not compare 1:1 with per-run browsing.
analytics.summary_note_open_date_range: Date range open-ended: settling_actions_per_day uses a 1-day divisor; set date_from and date_to for meaningful per-day rates.
analytics.summary_note_scope_memory: Current-state metrics use entity scope; date filters apply only to review-action and job-based metrics.
analytics.summary_note_scope_sql: Current-state metrics use entity scope; review-action date filters apply to review KPIs; average processing time and job success rate use job timestamps (finished_at / updated_at) in range.

analyticsDashboard.title: Analytics
analyticsDashboard.subtitle: Operational summary, quality, timing, providers, and run comparison
analyticsDashboard.helper: Indicators combine position metrics, processing runs, and LLM costs. Warnings indicate interpretation limits.

visual.emptyChart: Not enough data for this chart in the selected scope.
visual.notARecommendation: Informational comparison; does not automatically recommend a provider.
visual.scopeNote: Indicators combine position metrics, processing runs, and LLM costs for the applied filters.

quality.resolutionSubtitle: Operational funnel based on the applied scope and filters.

filters.title: Filters
filters.partialScopeNote: Some filters apply only to position metrics or only to run metrics depending on current backend support.

analyticsDashboard.kpi_positions_processed_desc: Positions that completed processing in the selected scope.

costs.globalUnavailableDescription: Per-job cost snapshots exist, but there is no safe backend aggregation for total cost by inventory, aisle, provider, or model yet.
costs.compareAvailableDescription: Per-run costs are available in Comparison when the job includes llm_cost_snapshot.
costs.unavailableExplain: The system keeps per-job cost snapshots, but no safe backend aggregation exists for the global dashboard yet.
costs.llmCostHint: LLM processing costs from per-job snapshots.
costs.notAvailableHelper: The backend did not return a safe value for this scope.
costs.loadError: Cost metrics could not be loaded.
costs.empty: No jobs with costs for the selected scope.
costs.emptyNoJobs: No jobs in the selected scope.
costs.emptyNoCostSnapshots: There are jobs in the selected scope, but none have a valid cost snapshot.
costs.columnsContext: Costs use per-job snapshots. Counted quantity may reflect the current operational state and not only the selected range or provider.
costs.providerUnitCostUnavailable: Not calculated when counted quantity is not attributed per provider/model.

costWarnings.COST_SNAPSHOT_MISSING_FOR_SOME_JOBS: Some jobs do not have a cost snapshot.
costWarnings.PARTIAL_COST_CAPTURE_PRESENT: Some jobs have partial cost capture.
costWarnings.LEGACY_JOBS_WITHOUT_COST: Some legacy jobs have no recorded cost.
costWarnings.COST_PER_UNIT_NOT_AVAILABLE: Cost per unit is not available for this scope.
costWarnings.COUNTED_QUANTITY_SCOPE_CAPPED: Counted quantity is not returned because the scope was capped for safety.
costWarnings.COUNTED_QUANTITY_IS_OPERATIONAL_CURRENT_: Counted quantity reflects the current operational state and may not represent only jobs in the selected range.
costWarnings.PROVIDER_MODEL_UNIT_COST_NOT_AVAILABLE: Provider/model cost per unit is unavailable because counted quantity is not attributed per provider.
costWarnings.PROVIDER_MODEL_QUANTITY_DENOMINATOR_NOT_: Counted quantity is not attributed per provider/model.
costWarnings.INVALID_COMPUTED_COST_PRESENT: Some jobs have invalid computed cost.
costWarnings.DATE_RANGE_CAPPED: The date range was capped by system limits.

compare.title: Run comparison
compare.description: Compare 2 to 3 runs from the same aisle on test inventories. Quantity deltas are neutral; cost is per selected run, not global.
compare.embeddedSubtitle: Compare 2 to 3 runs from the same aisle on this test inventory.
compare.unknownModeTooltip: Could not determine whether this inventory allows comparison.
compare.selectInventoryHint: Select an inventory in the filters to enable comparison.
compare.quantityDeltaNeutral: Quantity delta is contextual and does not automatically mean better or worse.
compare.notRecommendation: This comparison does not automatically recommend a provider.

providers.sectionTitle: Operational comparison by provider and model

drilldown.noInventoryData: No inventory data in the selected scope.
drilldown.noAisleData: No aisle data in the selected scope.
drilldown.noJobs: No runs recorded for this aisle.
drilldown.notCorrectionsHelper: “Review required” means pending items; it is not the same as completed corrections.
drilldown.scopeWarningsHelper: These warnings correspond to the current analytics scope and applied filters.
drilldown.scopeCaption: This detail uses the current analytics scope and applied filters.

partial.analyticsFailed: Position metrics could not be loaded. Run metrics are shown when available.
partial.observabilityFailed: Run metrics could not be loaded. Position metrics are shown when available.
partial.costFailed: Cost metrics could not be loaded.
partial.observabilityNoSnapshot: Some runs lack an audit snapshot; some indicators may be incomplete.
partial.compareNotAvailable: Run comparison is not available for the selected inventory.

compare.execution_lower_is_better: Lower wall time is better (Run B − Run A).

llm_cost_note.canonical_model_without_catalog_entry: Canonical model has no pricing row (check catalog aliases and entries)
llm_cost_note.pricing_present_but_no_billable_dimensio: Pricing present but no billable dimensions

compare_many.insight_faster_but_unknown_up: Target is faster ({{time}}) but unknown internal codes increased by {{unknown}}.
compare_many.insight_slower_but_unknown_down: Target is slower ({{time}}) but unknown internal codes decreased by {{unknown}}.
compare_many.summary_exec_unavailable: Execution time: not all runs have start/finish timestamps (e.g. still running).
compare_many.baseline_adjusted_notice: Baseline adjusted to match current selection.
compare_many.delta_legend_body: Color indicates better/worse for needs review, unknown internal code, and wall time (lower time is better).
compare_many.diff_summary_stats: Only in baseline: {{onlyBaseline}}, only in target: {{onlyTarget}}, keys in both: {{both}}, quantity changed: {{qty}}, SKU changed: {{sku}}, position changed: {{pos}}.
compare_many.empty_instruction: Select one aisle, choose 2-3 runs, set a baseline, and apply comparison.

errors.pick_valid_baseline: Select a baseline from selected jobs.

compare_many.job_metrics: Qty: {{qty}} · Needs review: {{review}} · Unknown code: {{unknown}} · Consolidated: {{consolidated}}
compare_many.subtitle: Compare selected runs against one baseline.
compare_many.summary_not_ranking: Summary is quick context only; it is not a ranking or recommendation.
compare_many.summary_values: Jobs: {{jobs}} · Total quantity min/max: {{qtyMin}} / {{qtyMax}} · Needs review min/max: {{reviewMin}} / {{reviewMax}} · Consolidated positions min/max: {{consolidatedMin}} / {{consolidatedMax}} · Unknown internal code min/max: {{unknownMin}} / {{unknownMax}}
compare_many.target_non_ideal_status: Target run status is not succeeded; review results carefully.

benchmark.costPerUnitHelper: Cost per unit is calculated only for this selected run.
benchmark.neutralQuantityHelper: Quantity and consolidated position deltas are neutral: a difference does not automatically imply better quality.
benchmark.contextualReviewHelper: Lower review required can be positive, but depends on detection and review criteria.
benchmark.costSnapshotHelper: Costs correspond to per-run LLM snapshots.
benchmark.notRecommendation: Comparison is contextual and does not automatically recommend a provider.
benchmark.sameAisleContext: Results compare runs from the same aisle.
benchmark.needsReviewNotCorrections: Review required does not equal corrections completed.
benchmark.diffDependsOnPrompt: Differences may depend on prompt, provider, model, and visual input.
benchmark.expandForDiffRows: Expand details to see SKU, quantity, and position differences.
benchmark.truncatedDiffWarning: Difference rows are truncated; more changes may exist.
